name: WZML-X Leech Bot
description: Telegram leech bot supporting direct links, torrents, yt-dlp, JDownloader and Usenet

DATABASE_URL.description: MongoDB connection string (use MongoDB Atlas free tier)

LEECH_DUMP_CHAT.description: Telegram chat/channel ID to send leeched files

DOWNLOAD_DIR.description: Download directory path (use /tmp on Heroku - ephemeral filesystem)

BASE_URL.description: Your Heroku app URL (required for torrent file selection UI)

DISABLE_TORRENTS.description: Set True to disable qBittorrent (saves memory, recommended unless you need torrent support)

UPSTREAM_REPO.description: GitHub repo URL for auto-updates on restart (optional)
